raw_consumer_statement: Upon renewing my credit card and paying the {$95.00} fee in XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX I was offered a retention offer to spend {$95.00} in purchase and receive a {$95.00} statement credit. This never posted to my account despite me fulfilling my end of the offer. I have contacted Citi Bank 5 times now, and they refuse to resolve the issue. I have heard complaints of this happening, and I figure they feel I will just eventually give up. Please advise. XXXX XXXX
